item.title: Mastering Career Gaps 🌟 • Be honest about your gaps—no need to hide. • Highlight skills gained during breaks. • Use: “I enhanced my skills in X during my break.” • Connect past roles to the new position. • Show enthusiasm for returning to work. How can you present your career break as a period of growth? #resume #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Mastering Career Gaps 🌟 • Be honest about your gaps—no need to hide. • Highlight skills gained during breaks. • Use: “I enhanced my skills in X during my break.” • Connect past roles to the new position. • Show enthusiasm for returning to work. How can you present your career break as a period of growth? #resume #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
